package rulecoverage

func PositiveFormfileOpenReadallWholeUpload() string {
    ruleID := "formfile_open_readall_whole_upload"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that open uploaded form files and then materialize them with io.ReadAll(...)."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
